title: Roth-Del Masona

'''Roth-Del Masona''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the war, Masona was appointed the adjutant of former [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].

==Biography==
[[File:Roth-Del_Masona_TLC.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Roth-Del Masona]]
Discovered during his earliest days to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Roth-Del Masona was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. A [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|student]] of the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]], Masona was eventually taken as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] after passing his [[Initiate Trials/Legends|last academy tests]]. After years of on-on-one study with a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and crafting a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Masona passed the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

At the height of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] that had erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Masona was stationed on Coruscant when Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] assembled a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|task force]] meant to rescue captured Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who was sentenced to death by execution by the Confederacy's leaders, along with [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and Jedi Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Arriving on the dusty world of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Masona and his fellow Jedi stormed the [[Petranaki arena]] and rescued their fellow Jedi, though many others were killed in the process. When the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] had the survivors surrounded and Confederacy leader [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] ordered that the droids open fire on the survivors, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] arrived with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and evacuated the remaining Jedi. Boarding a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Republic gunship]] and flying out onto the plains of the world, Masona led a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the [[Battle of Geonosis (disambiguation)|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="AOTC" />

Returning to the Temple on Coruscant, Masona accepted the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the Grand Army and also the position of adjutant of Master Windu himself. Fighting bravely in the three years of war, Jedi Master Masona was stationed on Coruscant when [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], leader of the Separatist fleet, emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the skies of [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. Along with Jedi Masters [[Roron Corobb/Legends|Roron Corobb]], [[Foul Moudama]], and [[B'ink Utrila]], Masona was assigned to reinforce Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] and [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] in locating and protecting the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]]. As the Republic war machine [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|fought]] to protect the capital planet, Masona and his team were rushing Chancellor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] into a bunker deep in the crust of Coruscant. As Master Shaak Ti fought to defend the doors to the bunker, Grievous slipped past unnoticed and engaged the four Jedi protecting Palpatine in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. Grievous dueled them briefly, and, despite Masona being a renowned duelist, famous for his mastery of Ataru, Grievous was able to [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitate]] Masona, becoming the first casualty in the fight. Masona's comrade, Jedi [[Roron Corobb/Legends|Roron Corobb]] accidentally kicked Masona's head across the room during the fight, causing the Jedi to become distracted enough for Grievous to kill him and the remaining two defenders.<ref name="LoE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Roth-Del Masona was portrayed by [[Leonard L. Thomas|Leonard Thomas]] in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], with "Masona" a [[tuckerization]] of Thomas' name.

While unnamed in ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', the Jedi defending the Supreme Chancellor was retconned to be Masona by his mention in ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]''. His appearance in ''Labyrinth of Evil'' contradicts the same events as they were portrayed in the television series ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''.
